task: P4-01S — Evidence-First Data Foundation & Phase 1 Readiness Audit
evidence_method: Direct SQLite queries on prisma/dev.db — no assumptions

data_sources.trading_day_depth_estimate: ~805 raw distinct dates; 127796 rows use ISO format (2017+), 2701 rows have non-ISO or ROC-format dates
data_sources.date_format_issue: CRITICAL — some rows contain ROC-calendar format '1150327' (民國115年3月27日) instead of ISO '2026-03-27'. Affects alignment with MarketIndex.
data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe possible if date is used as event-date (point-in-time close price). No future leakage from schema.
data_sources.notes_500d: 185 symbols have >=500 rows. 127,796 rows are ISO-formatted. Full universe coverage exists for 2017–2026.
blockers: ROC-format date contamination (~2701 rows). Must normalize before alignment with MarketIndex TAIEX.

data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe for cross-sectional filtering. Industry codes are static metadata, not time-series.
blockers: industry field contains numeric codes only (e.g. '28', '24'). No descriptive sector names in schema.
274 stocks have NULL or empty industry code.
No ETF/stock flag in schema — must be derived by symbol pattern heuristic.
No listed/OTC classification field.

taiex_specific.note: TAIEX last updated 2026-03-17. StockQuote extends to 2026-05-18. Gap = ~47 trading days (Apr-May 2026).

sector_index_examples: 電腦及週邊設備類指數
data_sources.date_format_issue: One row with ROC-format date '1150327' detected (likely data ingestion artifact).
data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe. Index values represent published end-of-day data.
blockers: TAIEX freshness gap: 2026-03-17 is the last entry. ~47 trading days stale.
Sector index names are Chinese strings — need mapping table to numeric industry codes.
ROC-format date artifact in 1 row.

data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe. Fields: foreignBuy, trustBuy, dealerBuy, totalBuy, holders400, holders1000.
data_sources.notes_500d: Only 236 distinct dates. Need 500+ trading days for reliable window backtesting.
blockers: Need backfill to 2020+ (~5 years) for robust 500d window validation.
No margin balance, short selling, or dealer net position breakdown.

data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe if release-date offset applied (monthly revenue announced mid-following-month).
data_sources.notes_500d: Only 2 months of data. Need 60+ months for credible revenue trend/event hypotheses.
blockers: Only 2026-02 and 2026-03 available.
Need multi-year backfill (~5 years = 60 months).
No backfill script found in scripts/ directory.
PIT offset: revenue for month M is released around day 10 of month M+1 — must account for this.

data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe if report publication date is used (quarterly earnings released ~45 days after quarter end).
data_sources.notes_500d: Only 1 quarter available. Need 20+ quarters (5 years) for fundamental event hypotheses.
blockers: Only 2025 Q4 data available.
Missing: ROE, ROA, cash flow, debt ratio — only eps, netIncome, grossMargin, operatingMargin exist.
No backfill script for FinancialReport (only ingest-financials.ts for current quarter).
Need 5 years of quarterly data for cross-sectional fundamental ranking.

data_sources.notes: Date range appears to be a single date (or ROC-format issue similar to StockQuote). Contains PE, PB, dividend yield — useful for valuation screening.
data_sources.pit_safety_assessment: PIT-safe if daily snapshots are stored. Current evidence suggests only latest values stored.
blockers: Likely stores only latest metrics snapshot, not time-series history.
No short selling balance table found in DB. Requires new external data source (TWSE margin trading data).
No margin balance table found. InstitutionalChip has holders400/holders1000 (proxy) but not standard margin balance.
No dividend or ex-right event table found. FinancialReport has earnings but not dividend schedule or ex-date.

critical_issues: StockQuote / MarketIndex date format mismatch: ROC-calendar dates vs ISO dates contaminate alignment.
TAIEX freshness gap: last entry 2026-03-17, StockQuote extends to 2026-05-18 (~47 trading days stale).
InstitutionalChip depth insufficient for 500d window — only 236 trading days.
MonthlyRevenue: 2 months only, completely unusable for hypothesis design.
FinancialReport: 1 quarter only, completely unusable for fundamental hypothesis design.
summary.p4_readiness_verdict: P4-01 data foundation is PARTIALLY READY. StockQuote + MarketIndex can support P4-02 (Cross-Sectional Ranking) and P4-03 (Market Regime Classifier) after date alignment fix. P4-05 (Institutional Flow hypothesis) is BLOCKED pending InstitutionalChip backfill.
